title: Lecce, Apulia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Lecce, Apulia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.

Overview

Lecce is a city in Apulia with a population of 95,000. The Florence of the South, renowned for its stunning Baroque architecture, ornate churches, and warm Salento hospitality.
